name: image-post
description: Folder2Page / image-post — Facebook Multi-Page Auto Content Poster with AI captions (OpenRouter/Gemini/Groq) and proxy support

scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.postinstall: echo 'Run `npm run build` to build the frontend before `npm start`.'
scripts.lint: node --check server.js && node -e "['controllers/apiController.js','controllers/aiController.js','engine/postingEngine.js','services/aiCaptionService.js','services/facebookService.js','services/proxyService.js','database/db.js','routes/apiRoutes.js'].forEach(f => require('child_process').execSync('node --check ' + f, { stdio: 'inherit' }))"
